title: Amazing Spring
overview: In this modern society, the standard of living is constantly improving, and the disparity between the rich and the poor is growing. It's as if they are living in two different worlds. Coupled with the development of technology and social networks, the poor are constantly marginalized, and wealthy people continue to flaunt their riches.

trailers.title: 《AMAZING SPRING 大地回春》(Official Trailer) - In cinemas CNY 5 February 2019
